scriptDesc: Install the JumpJump VPN Windows client via the official direct-download installer (with optional Chocolatey attempt if a package name is configured)

messages.checking: Checking for existing JumpJump VPN install...
messages.notFound: JumpJump VPN not found -- will install via direct download
messages.chocoSkipped: No chocoPackage configured -- skipping Chocolatey attempt and going straight to direct download
messages.chocoFailedFallback: Chocolatey install failed -- falling back to direct download installer
messages.directDisabled: Direct download disabled in config and Chocolatey did not install -- nothing else to try
messages.verifyFailed: Install completed but JumpJumpVPN.exe was not found in any expected location -- vendor may have renamed the launcher; update executableNames / installDirs in config.json
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.cleanupSkipped: Post-uninstall cleanup disabled in config -- skipping registry + shortcut sweep
messages.cleanupStart: Sweeping leftover JumpJump VPN registry keys + shortcuts...
messages.cleanupSummary: Cleanup summary -- registry: {regRemoved} removed / {regMissing} clean / {regFailed} failed; shortcuts: {scRemoved} removed / {scMissing} clean / {scFailed} failed

commands.install: Install JumpJump VPN via direct download (or Chocolatey if chocoPackage is set)
commands.uninstall: Uninstall JumpJump VPN, sweep registry + shortcuts, remove tracking
commands.reinstall: Uninstall then install (use bare dispatcher: .\run.ps1 reinstall jumpjump-vpn)
